    bun run build     # -> dist/minima (a self-contained native binary)

Done — the wordmark is redesigned and building cleanly. **What it looks like** (single line, baseline-aligned): > **minima** · by Mubit - **minima** — the focus: extra-bold (800), 23px, tight `-0.6` tracking. - **· by Mubit** — small (13px), semibold, muted grey, sitting on the same baseline so it reads as a quiet attribution. - **Monochrome** as requested: dark logo is white (`#f7f6f3`) + muted grey (`#8b8b90`); light logo is near-black (`#18181b`) + grey (`#6b6b70`) — no orange. - **Manrope-led** sans stack (falls back to the system UI sans, since the ``-rendered logo SVG can't pull the page's Manrope webfont). Both variants ship in `dist` and are referenced correctly. To eyeball it live: `cd docs-site && npm run dev`. A couple of things I can adjust quickly if you want to tune it after seeing it: - Size/spacing/tracking of either element, or make "by Mubit" more/less muted. - **Pixel-exact Manrope**: I can outline the text to vector paths so it renders as true Manrope on every device (removes the system-font fallback), at the cost of the SVG no longer being editable as text. - Switch to all-caps, or add the orange arrow mark before the wordmark.
